category_sources: source_facts.description says xmq is a tool and language for xml/html/json; official homepage describes XMQ as a configuration and data-storage language compatible with XML/HTML and JSON.
display_name_sources: official homepage headline uses XMQ; source_facts.name is xmq.
docs_sources: official homepage provides examples, grammar/API links, and the official XMQ PDF grammar/documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/libxmq/xmq, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names XML/HTML/JSON; official homepage states XMQ maps to JSON and can parse text using IXML.
